import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 97 or b == 101 or b == 105 or b == 111 or b == 117
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("vowels=#{count}")
end
